title: ACE’s Building Pathways Initiative to Conduct Events Focusing on Cross-Sector Partnerships, State Strategies for Student Success
summary_en: An April 28, in-person convening in Pennsylvania and a May 6 webinar, the next installments in ACE’s Building Pathways Initiative, are open for registration.
title_cn: 美国教育理事会“成才路径建设倡议”将举办聚焦跨部门合作、州级学生成功策略的活动
